title: androrchis × plessidiaca
intro: Androrchis × plessidiaca, also known as the hybrid lady's slipper orchid, is a cross between the species Cypripedium parviflorum and Calypso bulbosa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Androrchis × plessidiaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from the roots and rhizomes, which can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions.
